House Favorites

The classics.

03

Five years, hundreds of regulars, one short list of the drinks that built this place.

№ 01
Milky Way
$5.50
caramel + white chocolate

Our most-ordered drink. Sweet, smooth, and dangerously easy to order twice in one morning.

№ 02
Staff Pick
Funky White Boy
$5.50
vanilla + white chocolate

Vanilla bean meets white chocolate. Order it once — you'll be back tomorrow.

№ 03
Black Tie
$5.50
mocha + white chocolate

Both mochas. No compromise. Pulled with our Because Coffee blend from Dawsonville.

On the Chalkboard

Thirty drinks. One short list of regulars.

From the cult-favorite Funky White Boy to seasonal Pumpkin Pie — every recipe is house-named and hand-lettered. Crafted with our medium-roast blend from Because Coffee in Dawsonville.

day one ♡
Our Story

A little coffee shop on the square.

Stephen and Marilyn Martin opened Farmhouse Coffee in 2021 with a simple idea — a community spot on the Cleveland town square where the coffee was made right and the welcome was real.

Four years and three locations later, the idea hasn't changed. Same espresso blend from Because Coffee in Dawsonville. Same baristas who learn your order. Same hospitality that earned us 4.8 stars across hundreds of reviews.

— Stephen & Marilyn
Stay in the Loop

Get the good stuff first.

Seasonal drinks, new locations, and the occasional free pastry. No spam — we promise.

Small-town coffee, made by hand. Three locations across North Georgia, one mission since 2021.
